description: Laboratory handoff with repeated facts, controls, and deliberate SOLO user deposits.

turns.text: The Northglass specimen freezer uses alarm code VELA-384 whenever its temperature drifts.
Northglass freezer temperature alarms use VELA-384.
Dr. Imani Rook reviews the Northglass temperature logs every Thursday before the handoff.
Dr. Imani Rook is the Thursday reviewer for the Northglass logs.
The outbound courier crate waits in locker FJ-672 beside the east receiving desk.
The courier crate is in east-receiving locker FJ-672.
Technician Pavo Lin reports calibration exceptions to Dr. Sera Quill, the methods lead.
Pavo Lin sends calibration exceptions to methods lead Dr. Sera Quill.
The greenhouse humidity clipboard carries inventory tag LUMEN-245 near the potting bench.
Greenhouse clipboard tag LUMEN-245 is near the potting bench.
The archive key cabinet has maintenance label ORBIT-590 on its lower hinge.
Archive key cabinet maintenance label ORBIT-590 is on the lower hinge.
What alarm code does the Northglass freezer use?
VELA-384.
Who reviews the Northglass logs on Thursday?
Dr. Imani Rook.
Which locker holds the outbound courier crate?
Who receives calibration exceptions from Pavo Lin?
Dr. Sera Quill.
The new pipette rack arrived with one corner chipped, but it still sits level.
Someone moved the tea kettle away from the only convenient outlet.
The corridor lights stopped flickering after facilities changed the ballast.
I left the clean glassware cart beside receiving so it can air dry.
Give me the Northglass freezer alarm code once more.
VELA-384.
Which doctor reviews the Northglass temperature logs?
Dr. Imani Rook.
Where is the outbound courier crate waiting?
Locker FJ-672.
Which methods lead gets Pavo Lin's calibration exceptions?
Dr. Sera Quill.
